title: Department by Department Profit Use Cases
summary: Maps department-specific AI use cases to profit impact across finance, ERP, HR, marketing, sales, and leadership.
claims: Each department should be described in terms of profit impact, not just AI activity.
Finance, ERP, HR, marketing, sales, and leadership each have distinct cost, margin, revenue, speed, and risk levers.
This department-level framing is the right commercial language for AI value.
proof_points: This structure is a direct extension of the profit-lever and function-opportunity records.
It turns business-value framing into department-specific operating relevance.
It aligns with enterprise stakeholder expectations for commercial clarity.
